pages.description: The landing page for first-time visitors browsing phones, featuring a hero section with top-selling smartphone banners and 'Shop Now' CTA, followed by featured products carousel showcasing latest iPhones and Android flagships with prices and ratings, best sellers grid with quick-add-to-cart buttons, customer testimonials slider with star ratings and photos, and a newsletter signup for deal alerts. Targets shoppers seeking popular phones quickly. Primary CTA scrolls to products or links to /phones for full catalog.
features: Featured products carousel with swipe navigation and auto-play
Best sellers 4-column grid with image, price, rating badges
Testimonials slider with 5 real customer quotes and avatars
Newsletter signup form with email input and shadcn/ui button
Deal alert banner highlighting flash sales with countdown timer

pages.description: Main product catalog page for shoppers ready to browse inventory, displaying a searchable/filterable table of all phones sorted by price, brand, and rating with columns for model, specs summary, storage options, current price, and stock status. Includes category tabs (iPhone, Samsung, Google Pixel, Budget) and sort dropdowns. Each row has 'View Details' linking to product page and 'Add to Cart' button. Primary CTA is to view specific phone details.
features: shادcn/ui Table with 20+ phones, pagination, and row selection
Filter tabs by brand and price range ($0-300, $300-600, $600+)
Search input filtering phones by model name or specs
Sort dropdown for price low-high, popularity, newest arrivals
Stock badges showing 'In Stock', 'Low Stock', 'Out of Stock'

pages.description: Individual product detail page for customers evaluating specific phones, showing high-res phone images gallery with zoom, detailed specs table (screen, camera, battery, processor), pricing with storage variant selector ($999/128GB vs $1099/256GB), customer reviews section with average rating and 5 latest reviews, and add-to-cart form with quantity selector. Targets decision-stage shoppers. Primary CTA adds phone to cart.
features: Image gallery carousel with thumbnails and lightbox zoom
Storage variant selector updating price dynamically
Detailed specs table with icons for camera, battery, RAM
Reviews section with star ratings and 'Write Review' form
Quantity selector (1-5) with 'Add to Cart' button

pages.description: Discounts and promotions page for price-sensitive shoppers hunting bargains, featuring time-limited flash deals grid with slashed prices and 'Limited Stock' badges, trade-in program explainer with value calculator form, refurbished phones section with warranty details, and bundle deals (phone + case + charger). Primary CTA claims deals before they expire.
features: Flash deals countdown timers for 6 featured promotions
Trade-in calculator form estimating value by phone model
Refurbished phones grid with condition badges (Excellent, Good)
Bundle deal cards showing total savings vs individual prices
Clearance section with phones 50%+ off

pages.description: Company story page building trust for skeptical shoppers, featuring store history timeline, mission statement about quality phones at fair prices, team bios with photos, store locations map with 5 physical locations, customer satisfaction stats (4.9/5 from 10K+ reviews), and partnership badges with Apple/Samsung authorized reseller status. Links back to shop.
features: Interactive timeline of store milestones (2015 founding, 2024 expansion)
Team accordion with 6 key member bios and photos
Interactive store locator map with hours and directions
Trust badges carousel (BBB A+, Apple Authorized)
Stats counter animation (10K+ phones sold, 98% satisfaction)

pages.description: Customer service page for support needs and inquiries, with multi-channel contact form (sales questions, warranty, returns), live chat widget placeholder, FAQ accordion with 8 common questions, phone support hours table, and social media links. Targets post-purchase customers and hesitant leads. Primary CTA submits inquiry.
features: Contact form with dropdown (Sales, Support, Returns) and file upload
FAQ accordion with 8 expandable questions about warranty/returns
Support hours table showing chat/phone availability by day
Live chat button linking to support widget
Social proof section with response time guarantees
